journey.title: Your Simple Path to Home Charging
journey.subtitle: Four easy steps from curious homeowner to fully installed EV charger.
journey.step1Desc: Share your address, panel size, parking setup, and vehicle details in a simple form.
journey.step2Desc: Snap a few photos of your electrical panel and where you want the charger installed.
journey.step3Desc: Our system calculates a transparent price range based on your home's specific needs.
journey.step4Desc: A licensed electrician reviews your project and schedules your professional installation.

rebates.title: Rebates & incentives
rebates.subtitle: Search official incentive programs for your area and see what may apply to your install.

powerwall.title: Store energy. Power through anything.
powerwall.desc: As a Tesla Powerwall installation partner, we add whole-home battery backup that keeps your lights — and your EV charger — running during outages, while cutting your peak-hour energy costs.

brands.title: EV brands & partners we work with
brands.subtitle: Professional Level 2 installation for every major EV — backed by industry-leading charging and energy partners.

trust.title: Built on Trust, Backed by Pros
trust.subtitle: Licensed electricians across {region} — EV charging, solar, and panel upgrades done right.
trust.reason1Desc: Every install is performed by state-licensed, insured electricians — not handymen.
trust.reason2Desc: We handle all permit applications, inspections, and code compliance for you.
trust.reason3Desc: Neat conduit runs, proper labeling, and professional finish you'll be proud to show off.
trust.reason4Desc: No hidden fees. You see the price range upfront before anyone visits your home.
trust.reason5Desc: We specialize in home EV charging — not commercial, not general electrical.
trust.reason6Desc: Not happy with the install? We'll make it right. That's our promise.

savings.benefit2Desc: Plug in at home and wake up with a full battery. No more gas station stops.
savings.benefit3Desc: EV-ready homes sell faster and command higher prices in today's market.
savings.benefit4Desc: Add a Tesla Powerwall to store energy and power through outages.
savings.benefit5Desc: Federal tax credits, state rebates, and utility programs can offset install costs.

reviews.title: What Homeowners Say
reviews.review1Text: EVnation made the whole process effortless. From the online assessment to installation day, everything was transparent and professional.
reviews.review2Text: Got my Tesla Wall Connector installed in one afternoon. The electrician was knowledgeable and left my garage cleaner than he found it.
reviews.review3Text: They handled the panel upgrade AND the charger install. Permits, inspection, everything. Worth every penny for the peace of mind.
reviews.review4Text: Great experience overall. The quote was accurate and the install team showed up on time. Highly recommend for any EV owner.

faq.title: Common Questions
faq.q1: How long does EV charger installation take?
faq.a1: Most Level 2 installations are completed in 3–6 hours. Panel upgrades may require a full day and a follow-up inspection visit.
faq.q2: Do I need a panel upgrade for an EV charger?
faq.a2: It depends on your existing panel size and current electrical load. A 200A panel typically supports an EV charger without upgrade. We perform a load calculation to determine this.
faq.a3: Yes! Permit handling is included in our service packages. We file with your local authority, schedule inspections, and ensure code compliance.
faq.q4: What charger brands do you install?
faq.a4: We install all major brands including Tesla Wall Connector, ChargePoint Home Flex, Grizzl-E, Emporia, and more. You can purchase your own or buy through us.
faq.a5: Level 2 EV charger installation starts at $575. Panel upgrades start at $3,250 and permit service starts at $250. Tesla Powerwall and charger + battery packages start at $9,995. Use our quote calculator for a personalized estimate.
faq.a6: Yes. California customers can search official programs by ZIP on Drive Clean (driveclean.ca.gov) — use our Rebate Finder on the home or calculator page. We help coordinate SCE, PG&E, SDG&E, and other charger rebates during your install.

rebateFinder.title: Rebate Finder
rebateFinder.zipDesc: Find EV, charger, utility, and income-based incentives on
rebateFinder.zipHint: Enter a 5-digit ZIP to open personalized results.
rebateFinder.selectArea: Select a service area to see available programs.
rebateFinder.chooseRegion: Choose a region above to load programs.
rebateFinder.footerEligibility: Eligibility varies by utility, income, and equipment.
rebateFinder.footerCa: Drive Clean lists official programs — we help you apply during install.
rebateFinder.footerNonCa: California? Switch to a CA service area for Drive Clean search.
